title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Surrounded by Big Sisters!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I beat the older racers! Hehe. Maybe someday, I'll
become a cool big sis in someone else's eyes
too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If I can make it in a medium-distance race, I can
run in so many more races. Then I can make an
even brighter future for Trainer. ♪
